title: EasyAFK (Fabric/Quilt/Forge/Neoforge)
description: EasyAFK is a simple but feature-rich AFK mod for all major mod loaders
body:
![Example of EasyAFK in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf67297e4460cf8880cdbbcbcfdb775a5c1245c.png)

# ⭐ **EasyAFK - A Simple but Powerful AFK System**

**EasyAFK** is a lightweight yet feature-rich AFK system designed to make player inactivity management effortless.
Perfect for SMPs, community servers, or any setup where AFK behaviour needs to be controlled, displayed, or automated.

The mod handles everything from **AFK detection**, **tab-list indicators**, **title notifications**, **broadcast messages**, **kick timers**, and optional **protections** — all fully configurable.

## ✨ **Key Features include:**

**Tablist Prefixes**

![Tablist Prefix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df40359b47bccad875c25b13f8c2ac1bc9fc95b4.png)

**Title message when AFK**

![AFK Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/075deb1630861c1d43a494bdbc71ec68b68a0e02.png)

**Broadcasted AFK messages**

![Broadcasted AFK messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bda62abadff03f5ca9e432ea3cc8ad4d82fd1a1.png)

**Fully Configurable** _Looks slightly different for Fabric/Quilt version_

![Server config file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f857e8b37acae204f85afeaeb0776d90e03c46e2.png)

## 🧩 **Ideal For:**

- Survival servers
- Creative/freebuild worlds
- Roleplay servers
- Private SMPs
- Public networks
- Any server wanting clean, visible, configurable AFK behaviour

## 📦 **Lightweight & Server-Friendly:**

EasyAFK is optimised to be extremely fast and efficient.
No laggy loops — just clean, event-driven AFK tracking.

## 🔧 **Support & Updates:**

EasyAFK is actively updated, with more features planned.
Feedback, issues, and feature requests are always welcome!
